context.role: Ground obstacle that player must jump over, wider than small variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Medium difficulty ground obstacle, appears from game start (35% spawn rate)

visual_specification.shape: Two vertical cacti grouped together, desert plant silhouette
visual_specification.details: Two cacti side by side, same height (70px), visible spikes, hitbox 65x67px (3px margin from sprite)

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style and height as cactus_small
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (1 cactus), cactus_large is 102x100px (3 cacti with varied heights)

explicit_negations: No texture details beyond pixel art style
No shadow or ground connection visual
No height variation between the two cacti
